visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey tweed flat cap, round black-rimmed glasses, and a grey cardigan over a white shirt speaks directly to the camera in a studio setting. He uses frequent hand gestures to emphasize his points. The background is a soft-focus blue and grey wall. (2) Close-up shot of two smartphones, specifically vivo Y100 5G and vivo V29 5G, displayed side-by-side with graphic overlays highlighting their technical specifications. (3) The man is shown in a brightly lit electronics retail store environment, gesturing towards the camera. The logo for 'miko' is visible in the background and on overlays. (4) Back in the studio, a graphic logo for 'Tabelog' (a fork and spoon icon with Japanese text) appears next to the man. (5) A screen recording of the Tabelog app interface is shown, demonstrating a map of Fukuoka, lists of restaurants with photos of sushi and grilled meat, and various filter menus in Traditional Chinese. (6) The man appears again in the studio, holding his smartphone to show the app icon, then gestures with both hands as if presenting the information. Icons of sushi and celebratory graphics appear briefly around him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可殺很大!. [Subtitle]: 去日本自由行. (2) [Slogan]: 必下載的APP. [Logo]: 食ベログ. (3) [Logo]: vivo Y100 5G. [Logo]: vivo V29 5G. [Subtitle]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (4) [Subtitle]: 有看我日本旅遊影片的朋友. [Subtitle]: 就知道我每次去日本. [Subtitle]: 都會使用 Tabelog 的網站搜尋餐廳. (5) [Subtitle]: 如今這個日本最大美食平台. [Subtitle]: 推出了繁體中文APP. [Subtitle]: 為什麼我那麼推崇它. (6) [Slogan]: 日本餐廳資料庫. [Subtitle]: 因為它是被譽為日本餐廳資料庫. [Subtitle]: 收藏了89萬家的餐廳. [Subtitle]: 從米其林名店到平價小吃應有盡有. [Subtitle]: 還有8500萬真實評論還有超大量食物照片. (7) [Subtitle]: 讓這個餐廳查起來比Google還方便. [Subtitle]: 除了你可以查餐廳評價以外. [Subtitle]: Tabelog還可以直接預約. [Subtitle]: 目前支援預約店家高達9萬家. (8) [Subtitle]: 現在繁體中文出來以後. [Subtitle]: 讓我們在搜尋、預約使用它更直覺了. (9) [Subtitle]: 下次你去日本. [Subtitle]: 先打開Tabelog. [Subtitle]: 下載APP以後. [Subtitle]: 趕快去找你想要吃的日本道地美食.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a grey flat cap, a white t-shirt, and a grey patterned cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, professional studio with a blurred textured wall; an electronics retail store with shelves of mobile phone boxes and miko brand signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track begins with an energetic male voice speaking in Traditional Chinese over a driving, mid-tempo electronic pop BGM. The voice is clear, projected, and professional. (2) A sharp 'pop' or digital UI sound effect triggers as text graphics appear on screen. The vocal pitch rises to indicate excitement. (3) A synthesized sound effect resembling a confetti pop or a short burst of applause occurs when '繁體中文' (Traditional Chinese) is mentioned. (4) The BGM remains consistent with a steady percussive beat while the speaker describes app features with high articulation clarity. (5) Frequent 'whoosh' sounds are audible during screen transitions between the studio and app recording. (6) The video concludes with the speaker's tone remaining positive and encouraging, maintaining high arousal until the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem/Solution -> Feature Deep-dive -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the new Traditional Chinese version of the Japanese restaurant app 'Tabelog' while also endorsing 'miko' mobile shop as a recommended place to purchase smartphones for travel.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation of the 'miko' mobile store and specific highlighting of the 'Tabelog' app's benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly effective social media promotional clip combining tech hardware review with practical travel software utility. The energetic pacing and clear audio-visual integration target Taiwanese travelers visiting Japan.
